---
name: Enhancement Request
about: Request an enhancement to existing functionality
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Enhancement Description

A clear and concise description of the enhancement you'd like to see.

## Current Behavior

Describe how the current functionality works:

## Desired Behavior

Describe how you'd like the functionality to work after the enhancement:

## Use Case

Please provide a specific use case where this enhancement would be beneficial:

- **Who:** (user type or scenario)
- **What:** (specific action or workflow)
- **Why:** (benefit or improvement needed)

## Benefits

What are the key benefits of this enhancement?

-
-
-

**Pros:**

## Configuration Changes

Will this enhancement require configuration changes?

- [ ] Yes (describe):
- [ ] No
- [ ] Optional

If yes, please provide example configuration:

```bash
# Example configuration changes
```

## Command Line Changes

Will this enhancement require command-line interface changes?

- [ ] Yes (describe):
- [ ] No
- [ ] Optional

If yes, please provide example usage:

```bash
# Example command-line usage
```

## Backward Compatibility

- [ ] Fully backward compatible
- [ ] Partially backward compatible (describe changes needed)
- [ ] Not backward compatible (breaking changes)

## Security Considerations

Describe any security implications:

- [ ] No security implications
- [ ] May affect authentication flow
- [ ] Requires additional validation
- [ ] May expose new attack vectors
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Testing Requirements

Describe what testing would be needed:

- Unit tests for:
- Integration tests for:
- Regression tests for:

## Documentation Updates

Areas that will need documentation updates:

- [ ] Configuration guide
- [ ] Command-line reference
- [ ] Examples and tutorials
- [ ] Migration guide (if applicable)
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (security-related, major functionality improvement)
- [ ] High (significant improvement to existing feature)
- [ ] Medium (nice improvement, specific use cases)
- [ ] Low (minor enhancement, cosmetic improvement)

## Implementation Complexity

- [ ] Simple (single file change, straightforward)
- [ ] Medium (multiple components, moderate complexity)
- [ ] Complex (major refactoring, significant changes)
- [ ] Unknown (needs investigation)

## Related Issues

- [ ] This enhancement is related to issue # (link if applicable)
- [ ] This enhancement addresses feedback from issue # (link if applicable)
- [ ] No related issues

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the enhancement here:

- Links to related discussions
- Screenshots of desired behavior
- Performance requirements
- Integration points with other features
